title: Spider
description: Return the final answer for each Spider dev natural-language-to-SQL item.
baseline_summary: A placeholder SQL solver that always returns SELECT 1.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved Spider text-to-SQL question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return a SQL string for the current Spider text-to-SQL item. The verifier is adapter-style: it extracts SQL text from the return value and scores execution accuracy (EX) against the gold query using the spider sqlite databases.
